status: Target parameters for CFD/FEM validation - Subject to iterative refinement
audit_note: Cut-in wind speed revised from 1.5 m/s to 2.5 m/s following adversarial audit. Oscillating systems require minimum airflow to initiate LCO (Limit-Cycle Oscillation) — zero-breakout-torque argument applies to rotating systems only. 1.5 m/s remains a long-term Vector 2035+ target pending EHD integration.

operational_envelope.cut_in_wind_speed_ms_note: Revised from 1.5 m/s. Minimum airflow required to initiate LCO in oscillating structures. 1.5 m/s is a Vector 2035+ target pending EHD-assisted flow control (Axiom E1).
operational_envelope.cut_in_logic: Low-friction startup enabled by Zero-Impedance electronic control (Axiom T2.1). No mechanical breakout torque due to absence of bearings (Axiom S1). LCO initiation threshold dependent on blade geometry and Strouhal resonance.
